subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Sarah Herron et al in Dec. 1900
subcodes.first_line: The Book (Koran) revealed to Mahomet is the greatest proof of Him as a Prophet, as the Arabic language in the Koran has never, until now, been equalled.
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God
